title: Update VM Images + Drop prior-ubuntu testing
body:
#### What type of PR is this?
/kind flake

#### What this PR does / why we need it:

These images contain a workaround for:
     https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/11123

This mainly affects the system-tests, a small number of which make calls to podman.

Ref: https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/11070 and https://github.com/containers/automation_images/pull/88

#### How to verify it

All CI Testing will pass

#### Which issue(s) this PR fixes:

None

#### Special notes for your reviewer:

None

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

None

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *cevich* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fbuildah). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/buildah/blob/main/OWNERS)~~ [cevich] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
Changes LGTM, but the tests aren't hip.
These failures are happening on Ubuntu, so I wonder if maybe an update brought a service in to handle DNS caching or something.  I'll need to fire up a VM and check it out.
Ohhh Ubuntu...let me proclaim the love I have for thee :cursing_face:
